steps.title: Use the given value for x
steps.content: The second equation directly specifies $x = 1$. Rather than solving the system algebraically, substitute this known value into the first equation.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for y
steps.content: Plug $x = 1$ into $y = 2x + 3$: $$y = 2(1) + 3 = 2 + 3 = 5$$ The solution to the system is $(x, y) = (1, 5)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
